visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt and a black vest, sits in the passenger seat of a car. She holds up a large, unusually multi-lobed red strawberry that looks like a flower blossom, her face showing an expression of curiosity and surprise. The lighting is bright and natural from the car window. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a strawberry plant in a white elevated planter. A hand with red-polished nails touches a large, fan-shaped red strawberry growing among smaller, unripened green ones. The setting is an agricultural greenhouse or farm environment. (3) The woman stands outdoors at a strawberry farm with a green mountain and greenhouses in the background. She holds a strawberry in one hand and a cardboard box in the other, smiling brightly at the camera. A distant figure in a white sun hat is visible in the background. (4) Back inside the car, the woman takes a large bite of the flower-shaped strawberry. The shot is a close-up focusing on her facial expressions and the juicy red interior of the fruit. Yellow text overlays appear periodically at the bottom of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 為什麼. (2) [Variety]: 草莓. (3) [Subtitle]: 台灣的草莓是鬱金香樣子?. (4) [Subtitle]: 我採的都是花的樣子!. (5) [Subtitle]: 台灣一般草莓都長這樣?. (6) [Subtitle]: 我是人生第一次來苗栗採草莓啦!. (7) [Variety]: (吃看看). (8) [Subtitle]: 超級新鮮!!!. (9) [Subtitle]: 雖然沒有韓國草莓那麼甜. (10) [Subtitle]: 但也不是難吃的草莓. (11) [Subtitle]: 主要是汁多多這點我超喜歡.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground, 1 female worker in the background at the farm.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark brown hair, wearing a white T-shirt and a dark grey knit vest. She has prominent pink-toned makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a modern car with grey fabric seats and a black dashboard. The outdoor scene features a commercial strawberry farm with white elevated growing gutters, plastic-covered greenhouses, and a lush green hillside under a clear sky.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice exclaims with high arousal and a bright tone. An upbeat, electronic pop track with a Japanese female vocal starts immediately. The BGM features a steady four-on-the-floor beat and sparkly synth leads. (2) A quick 'whoosh' transition sound occurs. The speaker's voice continues rapidly in a mix of Korean and Mandarin, maintaining a high-pitched, excited prosody. The music continues without interruption. (3) A subtle outdoor wind floor is audible under the speech. The woman's voice becomes more projected as she describes the strawberry farm. (4) A loud, crisp, and wet crunching sound is heard as the primary audio event, indicating a bite into fruit. This is followed by soft 'mmm' vocalizations of satisfaction. (5) The speaker concludes with a review of the fruit's texture and sweetness, her voice showing high valence. The upbeat BGM maintains its energy until the clip ends abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents a Korean-speaking creator's first experience picking strawberries in Miaoli, Taiwan. The central hook is the discovery of unusually shaped 'flower-like' strawberries. The video concludes with a taste test and comparison between Taiwanese and Korean varieties, aiming to share a novel cultural and culinary experience with the audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media edit using multi-lingual speech to broaden appeal. Focuses on visual novelty (unusual fruit shape).
